evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Designa och forvalta en skalbar arkitektur for vart nya datalager.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD emphasizes building a scalable, sustainable architecture ('skalbar arkitektur', 'hallbara pipelines') alongside greenfield speed-to-value framing ('fran start', 'framtida datainfrastruktur'), landing at parity between rigour and velocity signals.
evidence.domain_risk: for att hela verksamheten ska kunna fatta smarta, datadrivna beslut
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: This is an educational institution's internal reporting and decision-support infrastructure with no financial, regulatory, or compliance language present, placing it as low risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Du kommer att arbeta med att strukturera data fran grunden
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The role explicitly builds data infrastructure from scratch, moving the organization off Excel-based manual processes with no existing pipelines or team, and even offers the chance to eventually build out a team ('pa sikt vara med och bygga upp ett helt team').
evidence.jd_authorship: Mycket starka kunskaper inom Google-ekosystemet: GCP, Google BigQuery och SQL.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Requirements and responsibilities name specific tools (GCP, BigQuery, Looker Studio, Python) and concrete tasks (migrating off Excel, building a data warehouse) precisely enough to picture the actual work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Skapa pedagogiska dashboards och rapporter for olika intressenter.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves the organization's own internal data consumers and decision-makers broadly, without naming a specific commercial, product, or finance function.
evidence.autonomy_level: far du stora mojligheter att paverka bade teknikval och arbetssatt
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The candidate is expected to define architecture, tech choices, and working methods from the ground up with significant influence over direction, a clearly strategic framing.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The JD contains no mention of AI tools, AI-assisted coding, or AI-consuming data infrastructure anywhere in responsibilities or qualifications.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data quality framework, or data contract language appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in growth and capability-building terms (architecture, pipelines, dashboards, digitalization) with no risk or compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Du kommer att arbeta med att strukturera data fran grunden, bygga hallbara pipelines
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role explicitly builds the data warehouse, pipelines, and reporting from scratch, migrating away from Excel-dependent manual processes with no existing infrastructure to fix.
evidence.language_gate: Flytande kunskaper i svenska och engelska, bade i tal och skrift.
evidence.urgency: Urval kommer att paborjas under v.33
evidence.work_arrangement: en flexibel hybridmodell, dar du har mojlighet att arbeta pa distans upp till 40% av din arbetstid
